intro: Pterostemma frigidum, also known as Chilean winter's bark, is a species of flowering plant in the family Ericaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, providing potential health benefits such as pain relief and wound healing.
